title: Travel The World
description: A toughened Vanilla experience to replicate that feeling of your first night, with a focus on realism and RPG elements.
body:
Description
---
Ever felt that Minecraft has become a bit too easy or stale for you? Not any more! The time has come to test your true survival skills!

Travel The World aims to add a greater sense of realism and challenge to your Minecraft experience. It adds new hardcore elements that will be sure to replicate that feeling of your first night, whilst still keeping true to a semi-Vanilla experience.

Key Features
---
<details>
<summary>Enhanced Structures</summary>
A variety of new structures have been added, whilst also improving many Vanilla structures, giving you much more to explore. This includes dungeons, villages, towers, and ruins. A big focus has been placed on immersion, meaning there are no absurdly large or floating structures.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Realistic Physics</summary>
You will need to ensure the structures you build are structurally sound. Removing all the supports of a building, or even mining the wrong block in a cave, can cause them to collapse! Explosions physics have also been overhauled for further realism, which will send blocks flying in all directions, and also finally allowing blocks to be damaged underwater.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Overhauled World Generation</summary>
The terrain generation has been overhauled in this pack, which means you will experience vast mountain ranges, deeper caves, dense forests with trees that dynamically grow, and continents for greater immersion.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Tougher Mobs</summary>
Mobs have been enhanced with increased follow ranges and new, unique abilities to increase their difficulty considerably. For example, creepers can breach walls, zombies can mine blocks to get to you, and spiders can shoot webs to slow you down. Buidling a shelter before nightfall is now more important than ever!
</details>

<details>
<summary>Immersive Day & Night Cycle</summary>
Sleeping is no longer an instant skip to day time. Watch as the moon and stars sweep over the sky above as you rest in bed.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Weather & Seasons</summary>
A completely overhauled weather system means you now need to keep an eye out for dangerous storms, such as hurricanes, tornadoes, blizzards, and sandstorms. A seasons system has also been implemented, which can introduce new challenges such as reduced crop growth in the winter.
</details>
